title: Slovakian Corn Fritters with Mozzarella
description: A crispy Slovakian-inspired corn fritter filled with melted mozzarella cheese, perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, flour, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and a splash of water.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Fold in the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Using your hands, shape the dough into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
Heat about 1/2 inch (1 cm) of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add 2-3 patties to the skillet and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer the fritters to a baking sheet and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden.
